body.content: observed architectural tension: The stock scheduler iterates school stances but its Conj rule uses the conjecturer role's default seat; school identity conditions a prompt/provenance field, not a route binding.
body.possible_next_move: Resurface through canonical attention and compare with formal candidates.
body.unfinished: Must be tested against repository evidence and foreign-school criticism.
body.why_keep_this: Provisional input to cross-school inquiry; it has no formal authority.
